overview: RegenCen provides physician-led hormone therapy, medical weight loss, and regenerative medicine for midlife and aging adults. The clinic specializes in bioidentical hormone replacement and testosterone optimization delivered through hormone pellets, IV therapies, and other personalized treatments.
highlights: Hormone pellets with 5-6 month delivery duration
GLP-1 medical weight loss program (semaglutide, tirzepatide)
NAD+ IV therapy and PRF injections
targetAudience: Men and women in midlife and beyond seeking hormone optimization and regenerative care.
